title: LITE Stock Lumentum Holdings (LITE, $132.56) was a top quarterly gainer, rising +65.12%
author: tickeron_community
selftext: [Lumentum Holdings](https://tickeron.com/ticker/LITE/) ([LITE](https://tickeron.com/ticker/LITE/), $132.56) was one of top quarterly gainers, jumping +65.12% to $132.56 per share. A.I.dvisor analyzed 85 stocks in the [Telecommunications Equipment](https://tickeron.com/tags/all/Industry-TelecommunicationsEquipment) Industry over the last three months, and discovered that 71 of them (83.33%) charted an Uptrend while 14 of them (16.67%) trended down.
